title: ranunculus flabelliformis
intro: Ranunculus flabelliformis, also known as the fan-leaved buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ranunculus flabelliformis include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
